title: Contract Request: Watermark (University of Nebraska Omaha)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nebraska Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

The most recent contract, governing, base, or master license agreement with Watermark Insights relating to the licensing of Watermark;
All related terms and conditions, terms of service, amendments, addenda, appendices, attachments, product terms, MOUs, MOAs, data processing agreements, and/or letters of intent; 
All financial documents or records of financial transactions, exchanges or obligations related to the contractual relations with Watermark Insights for faculty information system technology;
and
Assessment documentation including, but not limited to, the Higher Education Community Vendor Assessment Toolkit (HECVAT). 

Responsive materials include all contracts, agreements, amendments, appendices, invoices, and any other documents listed above that incorporate language governing terms of use of Watermark.

The scope of this request should encompass more than just direct contracts or renewals between the university and Watermark Insights; please incorporate all applicable agreements and supporting records facilitated through consortium entities like Lyrasis.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 4 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Michele Gibney

title: Traffic Stop Drug and Firearm Arrest Records

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Ohio Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Ohio Public Records Act, I am requesting all releasable public records related to a traffic stop and arrest involving illegal narcotics and/or firearm possession that occurred on or about [DATE], including:

- Body-worn camera footage
- Dash camera footage
- 911 calls
- CAD/dispatch logs
- Incident reports
- Arrest reports
- Search warrant records (if applicable)
- Evidence photographs
- Radio communications
- Jail booking records

I request that all records be provided electronically if available.

In the event that there are fees, please inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request.

Thank you.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

SAD Footage

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Ohio Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Ohio Public Records Act, I am requesting all releasable public records related to the investigation involving Jazmir Tucker, including:

- Body-worn camera footage
- Dash camera footage
- 911 calls
- CAD/dispatch logs
- Incident reports
- Arrest reports
- Interview and interrogation recordings
- Crime scene photographs that are publicly releasable
- Radio communications

I request that all records be provided electronically if available.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

SAD Footage
